title: toxicodendron calcicola
intro: Toxicodendron calcicola, also known as the golden ragwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Anacardiaceae family. The medicinal properties of the plant are derived from its leaves, which contain a compound called urushiol, a resinous sap that has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Toxicodendron calcicola include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. Toxicodendron calcicola is typically prepared as a salve or tincture for topical application, and it has been used in traditional herbal medicine to promote wound healing and soothe irritated skin.
